nav.profileTooltip: Coming soon! This is where you'll be able to access your account and the dashboard for all of your posted roles.

landing.hero:
Hire with precision.
Lead with confidence.
landing.subHero: We strive to make professional recruitment accessible to businesses that cannot afford a full HR team, and effortless for those that already have one.
landing.missionBody: Recruitment should not require a dedicated team to do well. Tarsheeh.cv is a multi-agent AI platform that makes the entire process Something to businesses can run without the overhead of a full HR operation team, and effortless for those that already have one. It reads every CV, evaluates every candidate against your job profile, and returns a ranked shortlist with full reasoning in minutes, not days.
landing.howItWorksIntro: Five specialised agents read every CV, score every candidate against the job profile, and returns a ranked shortlist with full reasoning. Post a role. Upload CVs. Receive your shortlist in minutes.
landing.screeningSub: Every candidate evaluated against the same criteria, without fatigue or bias.
landing.rankingSub: A scored shortlist with clear reasoning, not a pile of files to sort through.
landing.interviewPhrase: Questions that reveal character, not just competence.
landing.interviewSub: Tailored questions for each candidate, ready before the first interview is booked.

footer.credits: Team Nexus · Agenticthon 2026 · All Rights Preserved ©

job.title: Post a Role
job.intro: Describe the role you're hiring for. Our agents will handle the rest.

upload.title: Upload CVs
upload.intro: Add the CVs you'd like evaluated. PDF format only.
upload.dropzone: Drop CVs here, or click to browse
upload.hint: PDF format only, max 10MB per file, up to 20 files

account.title: Account
account.dangerZoneBody: This action is irreversible. Your account and all associated data will be permanently deleted.

account.errPasswordShort: Password must be at least 8 characters.
account.errDelete: Could not delete account. Please contact support.

auth.errPasswordShort: Password must be at least 8 characters.

auth.errSignUp: Could not create account. Please try again.

expired.title: This link has expired
expired.subtext: For your security, verification links expire after a short time. Request a new one to continue.
